summary: Cleaned up the Yoshi's Story ground/stage implementation by replacing anonymous local user-data structs and raw gv/offset fields with typed Ground union members for Randall and Shy Guys, renaming the Shy Guy parameter block symbol, tightening grstory function prototypes to Ground_GObj where appropriate, modernizing include paths/header guard style, and adding comments/doxygen for the nontrivial Randall and Shy Guy timer/spawn behavior. The PR appears to be a readability/type-clarity cleanup rather than a behavioral change.
what_changed: Renamed the local sbss symbol grSt_804D69B8 to shyguy_vars in config/GALE01/symbols.txt and in grstory.c.
Replaced the anonymous Shy Guy parameter struct fields unk0, unk4, unk8, and vars[7] with named fields timer_min, timer_rand, spawnmany_rarity, and vpos[6].
Changed grstory callbacks and declarations from generic HSD_GObj* to Ground_GObj* in grstory.c and grstory.h where the objects are ground objects.
Replaced direct gobj->user_data access with GET_GROUND(gobj) in the cleaned-up grstory functions.
Removed temporary local UnkUserData and UnkUserData2 structs from grstory.c and added shared Ground union members struct Randall and struct ShyGuys in src/melee/gr/types.h.
Added Ground.u.randall with timer and jobj fields for Randall's puff-effect logic.
Added Ground.u.shyguys with count, pattern, and timer fields for Shy Guy spawn-state logic.
Extracted repeated Shy Guy timer reset code into reset_shyguy_timer and repeated spawn-count selection into set_shyguy_spawn_count.
Annotated StageCallbacks.callback0 as an initialization callback and StageData callback2/callback3 as on-load and on-GO callbacks.
Added comments labeling StageCallbacks entries for Randall and Shy Guys.
Added doxygen-style comments explaining Shy Guy initialization, Shy Guy frame callback, Randall initialization, Randall puff timer callback, and the rarity parameter for multi-Shy-Guy spawning.
Modernized grstory.h guard from GALE01_1E302C to MELEE_GR_STORY_H and added melee/gr/forward.h for Ground_GObj.
Updated includes in grstory.c to use the local grstory.h first and angle-bracket project include paths such as <melee/gr/...> and <sysdolphin/baselib/...>.
Used ARRAY_SIZE(shyguy_vars->vpos) instead of hardcoding 6 for Shy Guy spawn-pattern selection.
Renamed local variables for clarity, including joint to jobj and several arg0 parameters to gobj.
smart_moves: Moved Randall and Shy Guy per-ground state into the central Ground union instead of maintaining file-local fake user-data structs; this makes offsets reusable and less error-prone for future stage work.

Preserved suspicious overwrite behavior in both the Shy Guy timer reset and spawn-count selection while documenting that the values are overwritten and may be leftover debug behavior, avoiding accidental behavior changes during cleanup.
Factored repeated logic into static inline helpers while keeping the original behavior visible and local to grstory.c.
Used Ground_GObj and GET_GROUND to communicate object ownership/type intent without changing the underlying callback table type in StageCallbacks.
Replaced magic spawn-pattern bound 6 with ARRAY_SIZE on the named vpos array, tying loop/random bounds to the data layout.
Improved symbol naming at the config level, making the sbss object searchable as shyguy_vars rather than an address-derived grSt name.
decomp_lessons: When a stage file uses hand-rolled local structs to describe gobj->user_data offsets, prefer promoting confirmed fields into the shared Ground union with domain names and offset comments.
Cleanups should preserve known oddities such as overwritten assignments if they are present in the original code; document them rather than simplifying them away.
Ground-specific callbacks can often be made clearer by using Ground_GObj* in stage headers and implementation while retaining compatibility with generic callback storage as needed.
For decompiled stage parameter blocks loaded from data, rename fields based on observed behavior such as timer_min, timer_rand, spawnmany_rarity, and vertical position arrays.
Use helper functions for repeated matching-sensitive logic only when the generated code remains equivalent; in this PR the helper names encode behavior and reduce duplicate offset manipulation.
Callback arrays benefit from inline comments naming object slots such as Randall and Shy Guys, especially when indices are still numeric gobj IDs.
naming_conventions: Use MELEE_GR_STORY_H style header guards instead of address-derived guards like GALE01_1E302C.
Use Ground_GObj* for functions that operate on ground object gobj values.
Use GET_GROUND(gobj) rather than open-coding gobj->user_data when retrieving Ground data.
Prefer domain-specific union member names such as u.randall and u.shyguys over generic gv.unk or local UnkUserData structs.
Name per-feature fields by gameplay behavior: Randall.timer, Randall.jobj, ShyGuys.count, ShyGuys.pattern, ShyGuys.timer.
Name stage parameter globals by feature, e.g. shyguy_vars, rather than address-based symbols like grSt_804D69B8.
Use jobj for HSD_JObj* locals/parameters rather than vague names like joint when the value is a JObj pointer.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Kept explicit overwritten assignments in reset_shyguy_timer and set_shyguy_spawn_count call sites to preserve original game code behavior and likely matching.
Used PAD_STACK(4) in Randall initialization after replacing the local anonymous user-data struct, indicating stack layout still needed matching care.
Reduced temporary padding in grStory_801E31C0 from u8 _[8] to u8 _[4], suggesting stack-size adjustment after typed cleanup.
Changed float literals to uppercase suffix style, e.g. 0.0F, 1.0F, 25.0F, while preserving numeric values.
Introduced inline wrappers/helpers such as randi, reset_shyguy_timer, set_shyguy_spawn_count, and frand_amp1 without removing the original control-flow semantics shown in the diff.
Replaced the hardcoded Shy Guy pattern count with ARRAY_SIZE(shyguy_vars->vpos), which is safer while still expressing the same six-entry bound.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

The PR body explicitly states the intended cleanup goals: add Randall/ShyGuys members to the Ground union, give variables and struct members better names, and add doxygen comments for nontrivial functions.
follow_up_queries: Find other stage files with local UnkUserData structs that should become Ground union members.
Search for remaining gobj->user_data casts in src/melee/gr that can use GET_GROUND and typed Ground_GObj signatures.
Search for address-derived header guards in stage headers that should be converted to MELEE_GR_*_H names.
Look for other sbss grXX_804D symbols that represent stage parameter blocks and can be renamed based on behavior.
Audit other stage callback arrays for unlabeled object indices that could be commented with object names.
